mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.site_id, r.prompt_template_id, r.relation_type, r.is_visible, r.is_editable, r.sort_order, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, s.name as site_name, t.name as template_name FROM gb_site_template_relations r LEFT JOIN gb_sites s ON r.site_id = s.id LEFT JOIN gb_prompt_templates t ON r.prompt_template_id = t.id WHERE r.site_id = #{siteId} ORDER BY r.sort_order, r.id

SELECT r.id, r.site_id, r.prompt_template_id, r.relation_type, r.is_visible, r.is_editable, r.sort_order, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, s.name as site_name, t.name as template_name FROM gb_site_template_relations r LEFT JOIN gb_sites s ON r.site_id = s.id LEFT JOIN gb_prompt_templates t ON r.prompt_template_id = t.id WHERE r.prompt_template_id = #{promptTemplateId} ORDER BY r.sort_order, r.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gb_site_template_relations ( site_id, prompt_template_id, relation_type, is_visible, is_editable, sort_order, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{siteId}, #{promptTemplateId}, #{relationType}, #{isVisible}, #{isEditable}, #{sortOrder}, #{createBy}, #{createTime} )

INSERT INTO gb_site_template_relations ( site_id, prompt_template_id, relation_type, is_visible, is_editable, sort_order, create_by, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.siteId}, #{item.promptTemplateId}, #{item.relationType}, #{item.isVisible}, #{item.isEditable}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM gb_site_template_relations WHERE site_id = #{siteId} AND prompt_template_id = #{promptTemplateId}
mapper.select: SELECT site_id FROM gb_site_template_relations WHERE prompt_template_id = #{promptTemplateId} AND relation_type = 'exclude' ORDER BY site_id
